name: meeting-auto-translate
description: Browser web app that translates the user's Vietnamese speech to a target language in real-time and routes translated audio into Zoom/Meet via a virtual audio cable.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm --workspace server run dev" "npm --workspace client run dev"
scripts.app:dev: npm --workspace server run build && concurrently -k -n client,desktop -c green,magenta "npm --workspace client run dev" "npm --workspace desktop run dev"
scripts.app:build: npm --workspace server run build && npm --workspace client run build && npm --workspace desktop run build && npm --workspace desktop run build:pack
scripts.app:build:dir: npm --workspace server run build && npm --workspace client run build && npm --workspace desktop run build && npm --workspace desktop run build:dir
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace server run typecheck && npm --workspace client run typecheck && npm --workspace desktop run typecheck
